name: Python Programming
description: Core Python syntax, data types, loops, functions, OOP, and file handling. The foundation for most tech tracks.

name: Mathematics & Statistics
description: Linear algebra, probability, statistics, and calculus concepts required for machine learning and data analysis.

name: Data Manipulation with Pandas & NumPy
description: Cleaning, transforming, and analyzing data using pandas DataFrames and NumPy arrays.

name: Data Visualization
description: Creating insightful charts and dashboards using Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Plotly.

name: Machine Learning Fundamentals
description: Supervised and unsupervised learning, model evaluation, overfitting, cross-validation using Scikit-learn.

name: Deep Learning & Neural Networks
description: Building and training neural networks using TensorFlow and PyTorch. Covers CNNs, RNNs, and transformers.

name: Natural Language Processing (NLP)
description: Text preprocessing, embeddings, transformers, and LLMs. Building NLP pipelines with HuggingFace.

name: MLOps & Model Deployment
description: Deploying ML models using FastAPI, Docker, and cloud services. Managing experiments with MLflow.

name: HTML & CSS
description: Building web page structure with HTML5 and styling with CSS3, Flexbox, and Grid.

name: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: Core JS concepts: variables, DOM manipulation, events, async/await, fetch API, and ES6+ features.

name: React.js
description: Building modern UIs with React: components, hooks, state management, React Router, and Context API.

name: TypeScript
description: Adding static typing to JavaScript. Interfaces, generics, and type safety for large-scale apps.

name: Version Control with Git & GitHub
description: Managing code with Git: branching, merging, pull requests, and collaborative workflows on GitHub.

name: Frontend Performance & Testing
description: Optimizing web apps: lazy loading, code splitting, Lighthouse audits, and testing with Jest & Cypress.

name: Backend with Python & FastAPI
description: Building RESTful APIs with FastAPI: routing, request validation with Pydantic, authentication, and middleware.

name: Databases: SQL & NoSQL
description: Relational databases with PostgreSQL and NoSQL with MongoDB. Querying, indexing, and schema design.

name: Authentication & Security Basics
description: JWT authentication, OAuth2, hashing passwords, and securing APIs against common vulnerabilities.

name: System Design
description: Designing scalable systems: load balancing, caching (Redis), message queues, microservices architecture.

name: Linux & Command Line
description: Navigating Linux filesystem, shell scripting, process management, permissions, and networking commands.

name: Docker & Containerization
description: Building and managing containers with Docker. Writing Dockerfiles, Docker Compose, and container networking.

name: CI/CD Pipelines
description: Automating build, test, and deployment with GitHub Actions, Jenkins, and GitLab CI.

name: Cloud Platforms (AWS / GCP / Azure)
description: Core cloud services: compute (EC2), storage (S3), databases (RDS), and serverless (Lambda).

name: Infrastructure as Code (Terraform)
description: Provisioning and managing cloud infrastructure with Terraform and Ansible.

name: Kotlin for Android
description: Kotlin syntax, null safety, coroutines, and OOP concepts for Android development.

name: Android UI with Jetpack Compose
description: Building modern Android UIs declaratively with Jetpack Compose. State management and navigation.

name: Android Architecture (MVVM)
description: Applying MVVM architecture with ViewModel, LiveData, Room database, and Hilt dependency injection.

name: Networking & APIs in Android
description: Consuming REST APIs with Retrofit, handling JSON with Gson/Moshi, and managing background tasks.

name: Publishing & Google Play
description: Signing APKs, App Bundles, release builds, Play Store listing, and in-app billing.

name: Networking Fundamentals
description: TCP/IP model, DNS, HTTP/S, firewalls, subnetting, and packet analysis with Wireshark.

name: Ethical Hacking & Penetration Testing
description: Reconnaissance, scanning, exploitation, and post-exploitation using Kali Linux and Metasploit.

name: Web Application Security
description: OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, IDOR. Using Burp Suite for web app testing.

name: Cryptography & PKI
description: Symmetric/asymmetric encryption, hashing, TLS/SSL, certificates, and PKI infrastructure.

name: Security Operations & Incident Response
description: SOC operations, SIEM tools (Splunk), log analysis, threat hunting, and incident response playbooks.
